d‚Üď.task: {d‚Üď} is the _ruby rune of dropping_, casting away from the start of the list on its right as many items as the number on its left. A rockfall has buried the first `n` runes of the vein `w` ‚ÄĒ recite what still shows.

d‚ą©.task: {d‚ą©} is the _ruby rune of commonality_, keeping (in order) the items on its left that also appear on its right. Which runes of the inscription `a` are echoed in the warding word `b`?

d‚Ćä.task: {d‚Ćä} is the _ruby rune of the lesser_, giving the smaller of each pair it stands between. A vaulted ceiling of `c` caps the crystal heights `v`; no crystal may rise above it.

d‚Ćą.task: {d‚Ćą} is the _ruby rune of the greater_, giving the larger of each pair it stands between. A risen floor of `f` lifts the crystal heights `v`; none may sink below it.

d‚ĆŅ.task: {d‚ĆŅ} is the _ruby rune of copying_, repeating each item on its right as many times as the matching count on its left. Sound the runes `w`, each echoing by its count in `c`.

d=.task: {d=} is the _ruby rune of equality_, marking 1 where its left and right agree and 0 where they differ. Where do the twin tallies `a` and `b` match?

m‚Č†.task: {m‚Č†} is the _emerald rune of first sightings_, marking each item of the list on its right that has not been seen earlier in it. Mark the first appearance of every rune in the chant `w`.

d‚ąß.task: {d‚ąß} is the _ruby rune of conjunction_, kindling a light only where both its sides are lit. Where are both the wards `a` and `b` aglow at once?

d‚ą®.task: {d‚ą®} is the _ruby rune of disjunction_, kindling a light where either of its sides is lit. Where is either ward `a` or `b` aglow?

m‚ĆĹ.task: {m‚ĆĹ} is the _emerald rune of reversal_, mirroring the order of the list on its right. The watchtowers along the shore report their heights as `l`; recite them from last to first.
